ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Jul-10-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paloma Carrero of Robins Cloud LLP telephone number 310-929-1745 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Michele Campbell.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that Ms. Campbell was not present. Robins Cloud LLP's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel of Record for Plaintiff Michele Campbell is granted. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
